title: Merck's sac-TMT Lung Cancer Data Offers Global Blueprint
headline: Merck's ADC sac-TMT shows potential to replace chemotherapy in front-line PD-L1-negative NSCLC, per China Phase 3 trial OptiTROP-Lung06.
key_facts: OptiTROP-Lung06 Phase 3 trial announced July 14, 2026; PD-L1-negative NSCLC; Wall Street analysts called results 'direct proof-of-concept'; sac-TMT described as Merck 'cornerstone' asset; partnership with Kelun-Biotech

title: Sanofi Sues Pfizer, Moderna Over mRNA Patents
headline: Sanofi files patent-infringement suit against Pfizer and Moderna over mRNA technology.
key_facts: Sanofi patent-infringement lawsuit against Pfizer and Moderna; July 15, 3:32pm publication; mRNA platform IP litigation; no damages figure disclosed

title: Europe Approves Oral Wegovy; Novo Beats Lilly to Oral Obesity Market
headline: European Commission approves oral semaglutide Wegovy 25mg once-daily, giving Novo Nordisk a head start over Eli Lilly in oral obesity drugs.
key_facts: EC approval July 15, 2026; once-daily oral semaglutide 25mg; Novo shares up ~2.6%; OASIS 4 data: 17% weight loss vs 3% placebo; ~one-third achieved ≥20% weight loss; first oral GLP-1 approval race milestone

title: Bora/Insilico Alliance: AI Drug Discovery Plus Manufacturing
headline: Bora Pharmaceuticals inks strategic AI-drug-discovery alliance with Insilico Medicine potentially worth over $2.5 billion.
key_facts: Potential total value exceeds $2.5 billion if fully implemented; plans for AI-driven manufacturing company; July 14-15 announcement; Insilico has Takeda collaboration valued ~$600M; positive H1 2026 profit alert; partnerships with Hisun, Menarini, TaiGen, Hygtia

title: Veradermics VDPHL01 Wins in Female Pattern Hair Loss
headline: Veradermics reports positive Phase 2 data in female pattern hair loss with VDPHL01.
key_facts: Phase 2 readout for VDPHL01 July 15, 2026; female pattern hair loss indication; July 15, 11:27am publication; clinical-stage catalyst in underserved market

title: J&J Posts Upbeat Outlook; Manufacturing Restructure Costs $750M
headline: J&J posts upbeat outlook but shares dip on oncology sales miss; restructures pharma manufacturing at cost up to $750M.
key_facts: Manufacturing restructuring cost up to $750 million; Stelara loss of exclusivity backdrop; oncology sales missed expectations; shares ticked down; immunology portfolio compensating for Stelara LOE; Icotyde launch tracking

title: FDA Resumes Issuing Complete Response Letters
headline: FDA returns to releasing CRLs, publishing 14 new letters and reversing July 8 halt on rejection letters.
key_facts: 14 new Complete Response Letters released; includes Hengrui/Elevar CRL; reversal of July 8 CRL halt; regulatory-transparency policy shift under new FDA leadership; acting chief walks back Makary's journal policymaking practice

title: Biotech Sector Selloff: Moderna -11%, SRPT -8%, IONS -9%
headline: Biotech selloff hits Moderna, ImmunityBio, Sarepta, and Ionis; Ionis Phase 3 trial failure erases a year of gains.
key_facts: Moderna -11%; ImmunityBio -8%; Sarepta -8%; Ionis -9% on additional Phase 3 failure; erases one year of Ionis gains; July 10 backdrop

title: Q32 Bio Alopecia Areata Data Drives 60% Stock Surge
headline: Q32 Bio stock surges 60% on positive alopecia areata trial data at 36-week timepoint.
key_facts: +60% stock surge on 36-week alopecia areata topline results; July 13 catalyst; BioPharma Dive notes 'surpassed investors' expectations' after 2+ year prior setbacks; underserved hair-loss market

title: Celcuity Gains FDA Approval; Positioned as Big Pharma Target
headline: Celcuity gains FDA approval for closely watched breast cancer drug, positioning the company as potential M&A target.
key_facts: FDA approval July 14, 2026; PDUFA target was July 17 (approval early); BioPharma Dive positioned Celcuity as strategic M&A target post-approval
